name: Sitemap Generator
description: Depth-focused Katana crawl for sitemap-style URL inventory.
long_description: Runs Katana with a deeper default crawl depth to produce a sitemap-style inventory of discovered URLs. This does not generate XML; it returns discovered URLs for cataloging target surface area.

fields.label: Target URL
fields.help: Enter the HTTP(S) URL to crawl and generate a sitemap from.

validation.message: Must be a valid HTTP(S) URL

fields.label: Depth
fields.help: Maximum crawl depth. Higher values discover more pages but may take longer to complete.

safety.consent_message: Sitemap generation crawls target resources actively.
